hooks.command: modified=$(git -C "$PWD" diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'CLAUDE\.md'); if [ -n "$modified" ]; then echo "REMINDER: Source files changed ($modified). Verify all relevant CLAUDE.md files reflect these changes before finishing."; fi

branch=$(git -C "$PWD" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); uncommitted=$(git -C "$PWD" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); unpushed=$(git -C "$PWD" log origin/${branch}..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$uncommitted" ] || [ -n "$unpushed" ]; then echo "REMINDER: Uncommitted or unpushed work detected. All tasks must be pushed to GitHub using conventional commits (feat:, fix:, docs:, refactor:, test:, chore:) separated by task."; fi
